known_biases: universe=per-factor natural universe (NOT intersection with Phase A1 5 panels)
industry_label_map: current stock_info snapshot (no historical industry membership; per Phase D v7 V0.14 R14 Option B)
effective_n (cross-sectional cluster, ~294) is recorded as metadata only; p-values / DSR use time-series n_periods (no automatic cross-sectional shrinkage applied)
bootstrap CI uses Politis-Romano stationary block resampling to preserve autocorrelation
permutation null uses per (iter, period) independent seed
DSR uses empirical period-IC moments (skew=0.167, kurtosis=2.828)
universe drawn from local cache scan; delisted symbols absent (survivorship bias)
forward return is price-only (no dividend adjustment); total-return upgrade deferred to Phase A2
71 period(s) have tie_ratio > 0.3 (Spearman uses average-rank; reduced precision): ['2020-01-13', '2020-02-12', '2020-03-12', '2020-04-13', '2020-05-12']...
